title: Open Tower Defence
description: A mod that enable customize tower defence by data pack
body:
# Introduction:

A mod that enable customize tower defence by data pack.

# Features:

Custom Summon Item: Different item can summon different tower defence.

Custom Item Settings: Include item model, damage, stack size and so on.

Custom Tower Behavior: Include Shoot, Produce, Pult, Instant, Range Effect and so on.

Custom Shoot Bullet: Include bullet model, hit & trail particle, hit effect and so on.

Custom Tower model: Include tower animation, texture and model.

More features comming soon.
# Note:
Here is a guide about how to make your own tower : [Click Here](https://github.com/HungTeen/HTOpenTD/wiki)
